Title: PositionsTwist Density
Description: Twists the first input’s Density field around the Positions.

Options.Label: MaxDistance
Options.Description: The value represents how big the area of effect is in block units.

Options.Label: NormalizeDistance
Options.Description: Default is true. If true then the Curve’s input unit is normalized to the MaxDistance value, otherwise if false the Curve’s input unit is in blocks.

Options.Label: ZeroPositionsY
Options.Description: Flattens the positions input to y=0.

Outputs.Label: Positions
Outputs.Description: The Positions are the anchors that pinch and expand the Density field around them.

Outputs.Label: TwistCurve
Outputs.Description: The curve determines how the Density field is twisted depending on how close it is to a position.

Outputs.Label: TwistAxis
Outputs.Description: The axis around which the twisting happens.
